name: FERMENTATION
description: My newest obsession is fermentation. I love the process of fermentation and the delicious results it produces. I started fermenting in 2025 and I've been hooked ever since. I love the science behind it and the endless possibilities it offers.

subInterests.name: FERMENTIMER.COM
subInterests.description: I-ve built a Fermentimer.com web app to keep track of my ferments and keeping fermentation topics in one place

subInterests.name: KEFIR
subInterests.description: One of the first ferments I got into was milk kefir. I love the taste and the health benefits of it. Here is a link to the only place related to Kefir you'll ever need myfermentedlife.com/

subInterests.name: KOMBUCHA
subInterests.description: Kombucha camp is the place to be for all things kombucha. I started brewing kombucha in 2026 and I love it. It's a great way to get into fermentation and it's also a great way to get into brewing. Here is a link to the only place online related to Kombucha you'll ever need kombuchakamp.com/
